County school spend for K-12 lifetime cost assignment — NCES digest units may differ
Columns: state_name, state_fips, rpp_all_items_2023, medicaid_total_computable, medicaid_year, lep_count_reported, districts_with_el, el_school_year...

generators.name: County incidence join audit
generators.prompt: For each origin in origin_fiscal_scenario_2023, trace PUMA→county via puma_county_area_xwalk_2023 and join school_finance_county_2023 + chas_county_housing_stress. Where does area_wtd_current_spend_per_pupil (~$21 in scenario table) disagree with county F-33 per-pupil by >10x? Flag unit bugs before lifetime K-12 assignment.
generators.retrodiction: Would have caught school spend ~$21 unit anomaly noted in brainstorm memos before using in NPV.
generators.negative_space: National NAS education cost vs county-weighted ACS incidence
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: Per-pupil spend is comparable across NCES digest, F-33, and scenario ledger without unit harmonization

generators.name: Receiver-node episodic ledger
generators.prompt: Sum receiver_city_migrant_costs by node; compare to federal avg_federal_net for Mexico <HS in origin_fiscal_scenario. Build explicit episodic shock line (shelter/admin) outside 75-year NPV horizon.
generators.retrodiction: Would have separated Gould w33655 asylum shelter shock from Hanson composition weights.
generators.negative_space: Lifetime NPV treats all fiscal incidence as smooth annual flows
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: Receiver-city costs amortize into per-capita lifetime NPV

generators.name: IRS migration × immigrant stock falsifier
generators.prompt: Join irs_migration_county_2022_2023 net inflow to ACS origin_puma stock changes. Does tax-base mobility co-move with immigrant share increases? If not, IRS migration is a weak falsifier for fiscal attribution.
generators.retrodiction: Would have flagged IRS county migration as income mobility not immigrant-specific fiscal shock.
generators.negative_space: Tax return address change = immigrant fiscal burden
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: IRS SOI migration panels identify immigrant fiscal shocks

generators.name: State stage5 heterogeneity band
generators.prompt: From state_stage5_context_2023, build state_fips × education_bucket fiscal capacity quartiles (RPP, Medicaid, EL). Mexico composition weights × state shares should produce state-level lifetime bands, not one national scalar.
generators.retrodiction: Would have blocked national Mexico NPV scalar before stage5 context existed.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: Federal net proxy is constant across destination states

theories_tested.theory: County school spend join explains origin scenario per-pupil field
theories_tested.prediction: area_wtd_current_spend_per_pupil correlates with county F-33 median at r>0.5 after unit fix
theories_tested.duckdb_test: SELECT CORR(s.current_spend_per_pupil, o.area_wtd_current_spend_per_pupil) FROM school_finance_county_2023 s JOIN origin_fiscal_scenario_2023 o ON ...
theories_tested.falsifier: Correlation near zero or 10x scale mismatch → unit bug

theories_tested.theory: Receiver cities carry episodic costs larger than annual federal offset for surge cohort
theories_tested.falsifier: Receiver costs negligible vs federal microsim annual net

theories_tested.theory: State RPP scales federal net proxy differently for border vs gateway states
theories_tested.prediction: state_stage5 avg_rpp spread > 15% across top Mexico-destination states
theories_tested.duckdb_test: SELECT state_fips, avg_rpp_all_items_2023 FROM state_stage5_context_2023 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10
